title: Welcome
instruction: Position Claude Desktop on screen. The recording has started.

title: Browse Deals
instruction: Paste the prompt (Cmd+V) into Claude Desktop and press Enter. Wait for the response showing 5 deals.

title: Create a Deal
prompt: Create a new programmatic deal for our summer video campaign. We need $30 CPM floor price for video ads starting June 1st 2026. The deal is for our premium entertainment inventory on streaming.example.com.
instruction: Paste the prompt and send. Wait for deal creation response with PENDING status.

title: Send to DSP
prompt: Send this deal to our DSP partner for approval. Use seat ID 'summer-campaign-001'
instruction: Paste and send. Wait for provider response with buyer status PENDING.

title: Check Status
prompt: What's the current status of my summer campaign deal?
instruction: Paste and send. Wait for status response showing seller/buyer status.

title: Confirm & Activate
prompt: Confirm and activate the summer campaign deal
instruction: Paste and send. Wait for confirmation that deal is ACTIVE.

title: Pause Deal
prompt: Pause the summer campaign deal - we need to adjust creative
instruction: Paste and send. Wait for pause confirmation.

title: Resume Deal
instruction: Paste and send. Wait for resume confirmation showing ACTIVE status.

title: Wrap Up
instruction: Scroll through the conversation to show the full lifecycle. Recording will stop.
